title: Classic player
description: Give classic player animations to players
body:
Change the player animations to one you got in classic mode.
So you just have some crazy arms and legs mouvement when you walk :p

Looks hilarious on multiplayer :)




Require [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions)

Should work on any version that these mods supports.
